rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF ERNEST VAN WINKLE
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion Compelling Responses To Special Interrogatories
rulings.Rulings: Deny Petitioner's Motion to Compel responses. The interrogatories are not "self-contained" as is required by statute. CCP 2030(e)(5). The objections made are well-taken. Sactions in the sum of $100 are assessed against Petitioner/ moving party for meritless motion. (514/TJM)
